title: Entrance Door Knob Set 60/70mm Satin Stainless Steel
features: Rose Diameter: 66mm, Knob Diameter: 54mm, Rose Projection: 8mm, Projection: 66mm
To be used in conjunction with a tubular latch (Included)
Includes spindle bar and fixings required for installation.
Suitable for use on Solid Doors with a 30-46mm thickness
10 year mechanical garuntee - based on 100,000 cycles
